---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="home-hero">

# Corentin Mary

<div class="ornament"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>

<p class="affiliation">M1 Fundamental Physics · Cosmology track · Université Claude Bernard Lyon 1</p>

<p class="interests">
I work on cosmology and subatomic physics : neutrinos, gravitational waves, and the physics of the early universe. I came to physics through a longer route than most, and that detour has shaped what I look for : questions about the deep structure of the real, approached at the largest scale we are able to name.
</p>

<div class="social-links">
  <a href="mailto:corentin.mary@etu.univ-lyon1.fr">✉ Email</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/Corentin-phy" target="_blank">↗ GitHub</a>
  <a href="cv.qmd">📄 CV</a>
</div>

</div>

---

<div class="home-status">

<p><span class="label">Currently —</span> first-year master's student in fundamental physics (cosmology track) at Université Claude Bernard Lyon 1, preparing a research internship on neutrino cosmology at Università di Padova under [Daniele Bertacca](https://www.dfa.unipd.it/en/live-people/detail/index.php?key=BF190DDCD6865DB534188270BD321288) and [Nicola Bartolo](https://www.unipd.it/de/contatti/nicola.bartolo) (June – July 2026).</p>

<p><span class="label">Applying —</span> M2 research programs in cosmology and subatomic physics for autumn 2026.</p>

</div>
